channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.7%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: EXC from @pippacrerar.bsky.social
Angela Rayner has been cleared by HMRC of deliberate wrongdoing or carelessness over her tax affairs, the Guardian can reveal, paving the way for a potential leadership bid as Keir ...
item.description:

Angela Rayner has been cleared by HMRC of deliberate wrongdoing or carelessness over her tax affairs, the Guardian can reveal, paving the way for a potential leadership bid as Keir ...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Angela Rayner says she has been cleared over tax affairs

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer prepares to fight leadership bid by Streeting

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Rayner reveals she's been cleared by HMRC in Guardian interview. And more or less says she'll run if Streeting triggers a contest.
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...
item.description:
Rayner reveals she's been cleared by HMRC in Guardian interview. And more or less says she'll run if Streeting triggers a contest.
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...

item.title: i Politics: Ex-Special Forces colonel tipped for PM claimed £36,000 from taxpayer for PR and comms
item.description: Ex-Special Forces colonel tipped for PM claimed £36,000 from taxpayer for PR and comms

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner cleared by HMRC over tax affairs paving the way for potential leadership bid
